seoTitle: Lee County School Calendar 2027-2028: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Lee County School District 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 10 first day, May 30 last day, holidays, breaks, severe weather make-up days, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: The School District of Lee County starts the 2027-2028 school year on August 10, 2027 and lists May 30, 2028 as the students' last day with early dismissal. Thanksgiving Break runs November 22-26, Winter Break runs December 20-31, and Spring Break runs March 13-17. The calendar lists June 1-6, 2028 as severe weather make-up days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Lee County start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The School District of Lee County starts school on Tuesday, August 10, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Lee County Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 13 through Friday, March 17, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Lee County in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The students' last day is Tuesday, May 30, 2028, with early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Lee County 2027-2028 dates are severe weather make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The calendar lists June 1-6, 2028 as severe weather make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Severe Weather Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists June 1-6 as make-up days if extended severe weather days are needed.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs Monday through Friday in mid-March.

yearNumbers.label: Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs through the end of December before students return in January.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2026-2027 Calendar
content: The first student day moves from August 11 in 2026 to August 10 in 2027.
Spring Break moves from March 22-25 in 2027 to March 13-17 in 2028.
The last student day moves from May 27 in 2027 to May 30 in 2028.
